zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford是John De Mountford和Johanna Clinton的女兒，於1356年出生在英國諾福爾可霍可沃爾德 姆 維爾頓。她於1380年與Thomas Heath在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年之後在英國諾福爾可貝斯索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford是John De Mountford和Johanna Clinton的女儿，于1356年出生在英国諾福爾可霍可沃爾德 姆 維爾頓。她于1380年与Thomas Heath在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年之后在英国諾福爾可貝斯索普。

nameMeanings.name: Mountford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

variants.name: Manford
meanings: English (West Midlands; of Norman origin): variant of   Mountford  .

variants.name: Munford
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name from Mundford in Norfolk, so named from the Old English personal name Munda + Old English ford ‘ford’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mountford  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford was born in 1356, in Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, England as the daughter of John De Mountford and Johanna Clinton. She married Thomas Heath in 1380, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1440, in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford est née en 1356, à Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, Angleterre, fille de John De Mountford et Johanna Clinton. Elle a épousé Thomas Heath en 1380, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1440, à Besthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford wurde 1356 in Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, England, als Tochter von John De Mountford und Johanna Clinton geboren. Sie hat 1380 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England Thomas Heath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1440 in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford è nata il nel 1356 nel Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, England come figlia di John De Mountford e Johanna Clinton. Lei sposato Thomas Heath nel 1380, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1440, nel Besthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountfordは1356年にイギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルド クウム ウィルトンでJohn De MountfordとJohanna Clintonの娘として生まれた。1380年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルでThomas Heathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年以後にイギリスノーフォルクベスソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford(은)는 1356년 영국 노르폴크 호ck울드 c 윌턴에서 John De Mountford(와)과 Johanna Clinton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 Thomas Heath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 이후 영국 노르폴크 베스소에서 사망했다.

mn.Mildenhall: Mildenhall, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford nasceu em 1356, em Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, Inglaterra filha de John De Mountford e Johanna Clinton. Ela casou-se com Thomas Heath em 1380, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1440, em Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford родилась в 1356 г. в местности хоккволд кум уилтон, норфолк, Англия. Её родителей звали John De Mountford и Johanna Clinton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Heath в 1380 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1440 г. в местности бестаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Mountford nació en 1356, en Hockwold cum Wilton, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hija de John De Mountford y Johanna Clinton. Se casó con Thomas Heath en 1380, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1440, en Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
